Concrete Curbing Services in American Fork, Utah

American Fork is one of those Utah County cities that perfectly blends small-town character with modern growth. The historic downtown along Main Street has been here for generations, while the newer developments stretching east toward Alpine and the foothills of Mount Timpanogos bring fresh energy to the community every year. Whether you own a classic American Fork home near the city center or a newer build up on the east side, Buzz Co Curbing delivers decorative concrete curbing that elevates your property.

Drive through AF's established neighborhoods — the tree-lined streets south of Main, the family homes near American Fork Canyon — and you'll notice the difference curbing makes. Yards with clean, permanent borders around planting beds, along walkways, and framing driveways look intentional and well-maintained. Yards without curbing look like the landscaping is still a work in progress. We make sure your property tells the right story.

Our lineup gives American Fork homeowners real options: 14 integral concrete colors that won't fade or peel, 10 stamp patterns ranging from natural stone to smooth contemporary profiles, and 4 curb styles to fit your yard's layout. The mower-style curb is a favorite here — it lets your mower wheel ride right along the edge, so you can skip the string trimmer and spend your Saturday afternoon up AF Canyon instead.

We keep things simple and fast. Call or text for a free evening estimate. We walk your yard, recommend the right combination for your home, and give you an honest price on the spot. Most American Fork installs happen the same week — no multi-week wait, no runaround.

From the neighborhoods near Timpanogos to the growing communities west of I-15, Buzz Co has been curbing Utah County yards for over 15 years. Licensed, insured, and committed to the kind of quality that earns a 4.9-star reputation across the valley.

4.9-Star Rating
15+ Years Experience
Licensed & Insured

WHAT WE OFFER

Curbing Services Available in American Fork

Every service below is available to American Fork homeowners with same-week scheduling and a free on-site estimate.

Decorative Curbing

Decorative Concrete Curbing

Custom-poured concrete landscape curbing that adds clean, permanent borders to flower beds, walkways, and yard features. Choose from 14 colors, 10 stamp patterns, and 4 curb styles to match your home.

Learn more →

Landscape Edging

Landscape Edging

Permanent concrete edging that keeps mulch, rock, and soil contained while giving your landscaping a finished, professional look. No more plastic borders that shift and crack.

Learn more →

Flower Bed Borders

Flower Bed Borders

Beautiful, durable concrete borders for flower beds that eliminate the constant maintenance of traditional edging materials. Design curves and shapes that complement your garden layout.

Learn more →

Tree Rings

Tree Rings

Circular concrete curbing around trees that protects root systems, defines mulch areas, and adds a polished detail to your landscape. Custom sized to fit any tree.

Learn more →

Driveway Borders

Driveway Borders

Concrete curbing along driveways that prevents gravel spread, defines edges, and adds curb appeal visible from the street. The first thing visitors notice.

Learn more →

Walkway Borders

Walkway Borders

Clean concrete borders along walkways and pathways that keep landscaping materials in place and create defined, intentional-looking pathways through your yard.

Learn more →

Stamped Curbing

Stamped Concrete Curbing

Curbing with impressed patterns that mimic natural stone, brick, or wood grain. 10 stamp patterns available — all the character of premium materials at a fraction of the cost.

Learn more →

Custom Color Curbing

Custom Color Concrete Curbing

14 integral concrete colors that run through the entire curb — not just painted on top. Color-matched to your home's exterior, stone, or landscape rock for a cohesive look.

Learn more →

Mower-Style

Mower-Style Curbing

A low-profile curb design that lets your mower wheel ride right along the edge. No more hand-trimming. The most practical curb style for homeowners who maintain their own lawn.

Learn more →

Commercial Curbing

Commercial Concrete Curbing

Large-scale decorative curbing for commercial properties, HOAs, apartment complexes, and municipal projects. Professional appearance with the durability to handle high-traffic areas.

Learn more →

Curbing Repair

Curbing Repair

Repair cracked, chipped, or damaged concrete curbing. We match existing colors and patterns to restore your curbing to like-new condition without replacing the entire run.

Learn more →

Curbing Re-Sealing

Curbing Re-Sealing

Protective sealant application that extends the life of your concrete curbing, restores color vibrancy, and protects against UV fading and water damage.

Learn more →

SOUTH UTAH SERVICE AREA

Also Serving Nearby Communities

Beyond American Fork, Buzz Co Curbing serves homeowners from Draper to Provo and beyond including Draper, Lehi, Orem, Provo, Riverton, and many more.
